instruction: Restore the red side stripe on the currency euro icon on the left edge (rect x=12, y=16, 4x96, fill #e63946).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/currency-euro.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M14.25 7.756a4.5 4.5 0 1 0 0 8.488M7.5 10.5h5.25m-5.25 3h5.25M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/currency-euro.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M14.25 7.756a4.5 4.5 0 1 0 0 8.488M7.5 10.5h5.25m-5.25 3h5.25M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z"/></g>
  <rect id="stripe" fill="#e63946" x="12" y="16" width="4" height="96" />
</svg>
